mapper.sql: select r.request_id, r.user_id, r.title, r.description, r.location, r.contact_phone, r.status, r.admin_reply, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, u.nick_name as user_name from repair_request r left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select:
r.del_flag = '0' and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') and r.location like concat('%', #{location}, '%') and r.status = #{status} and r.create_by like concat('%', #{createBy}, '%')
order by r.request_id desc
mapper.update: update repair_request set del_flag = '2' where request_id = #{requestId}
update repair_request set del_flag = '2' where request_id in #{id}
